message:
feat(privacy): implement privacy mode gating for persistence (bd-26364)

Add privacy mode enforcement across persistence operations:

- New internal/privacy package with Manager for session-level privacy tracking:
  - RegisterSession/UnregisterSession for per-session privacy settings
  - CanPersist checks operation type against privacy config
  - PrivacyError type for clear error messages
  - Global default manager for easy access

- Privacy checks integrated into:
  - checkpoint/capture.go: Block checkpoint creation in privacy mode
  - events/logger.go: Silently skip event logging in privacy mode

- Comprehensive unit tests for privacy package

Operations checked:
- OpCheckpoint: checkpoint creation
- OpEventLog: event log writes
- OpPromptHistory: prompt history writes
- OpScrollback: scrollback capture
- OpExport/OpArchive: export operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
